g.text: M1 | vector-database-m1 | Vector Storage Engine (Contiguous / Aligned)
M2 | vector-database-m2 | Distance Metrics (SIMD / Kahan Sum)
M3 | vector-database-m3 | Brute Force KNN (Ground Truth Baseline)
M4 | vector-database-m4 | HNSW Index (Hierarchical Graph ANN)
M5 | vector-database-m5 | Vector Quantization (SQ8 / PQ / ADC)
M6 | vector-database-m6 | Query API & Server (REST / Concurrency)
